title: convolvulus oblongatus
intro: Convolvulus oblongatus, also known as the bush morning glory, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Convolvulus oblongatus has been reported to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its bioactive compounds like alkaloids and flavonoids. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
